attributes.action: Ban hating the YouTuber called New Routemaster Fan
attributes.additional_details: The haters of New Routemaster Fan take New Routemaster Fan way too seriously, they take him to the extreme and treat him like he’s worst than Hitler and they tell his supporters to stop supporting him and worst bus enthusiast like Shacario King keeps saying negative things about New Routemaster Fan’s videos for no reason. The haters of New Routemaster Fan don’t even want him ln YouTube or on any social media as they bully him to far
attributes.background: Ban hating the YouTuber New Routemaster Fan. This bus enthusiast does not deserve to be hated and any of his haters that bully him should be sentenced for 20 years in prison. Hating New Routemaster Fan is confirmed are the worst bus enthusiasts
